info.description: This provides the REST API for Pulsar Sink operations
info.title: Pulsar Sink REST API

get.summary: Fetches the list of built-in Pulsar IO sinks

parameters.description: The name of the builtin sink
parameters.name: name

200.description: Fetches information about config fields associated with the specified builtin sink

403.description: The requester doesn't have admin permissions

503.description: Function worker service is now initializing. Please try again later.

200.description: Reload the built-in connectors, including Sources and Sinks

503.description: Function worker service is now initializing. Please try again later.

parameters.description: The tenant of a Pulsar Sink
parameters.name: tenant

parameters.description: The namespace of a Pulsar Sink
parameters.name: namespace

200.description: Lists all Pulsar Sinks currently deployed in a given namespace

401.description: The client is not authorized to perform this operation

500.description: Internal server error (failed to authorize, etc.)

parameters.name: sinkName

401.description: Client is not authorized to perform operation
